source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two identical NMOS transistors M1 and M2 are connected as shown below. \(V_{bias}\) is chosen so that both transistors are in saturation. The equivalent \(g_m\) of the pair is:
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Nearly equal to the \(g_m\) of M1
